Container.Name: PlexPulse
Container.Overview: Self-hosted analytics dashboard for Plex Media Server. Track library growth, storage usage, and get a forecast of when you need more drives. Sign in with Plex directly from the UI.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the PlexPulse web interface.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the PlexPulse database. Use your appdata share.

Config.Name: Media Path
Config.Description: Read-only bind of your Unraid /mnt so PlexPulse can measure real disk usage on your array and cache. Do not change this.

Config.Name: Plex Server URL
Config.Description: Optional. e.g. http://192.168.1.50:32400 — leave blank to set via the UI instead. Do not use localhost if Plex is on the same machine, use the LAN IP.

Config.Name: Plex Token
Config.Description: Optional. Leave blank to sign in via the UI OAuth flow instead.

Config.Name: Monitor Paths
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of paths to measure disk usage on. Default /mnt/user covers the full Unraid array. Add /mnt/cache to track your cache pool separately, e.g. /mnt/user,/mnt/cache

Config.Name: Collection Interval
Config.Description: How often to snapshot library stats. Options: 1h, 3h, 6h, 12h, 24h.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: TZ database name for correct timestamps, e.g. America/New_York, Europe/London.
